title: Crispy Mediterranean Apple Crust
description: A savory and chewy dish featuring brown sugar, toasted nuts, and a light Mediterranean touch, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons brown sugar
ingredients.notes: packed to ensure enough moisture from the apples

instructions: Place the apple pieces in a greased baking dish.
Pour the melted butter over the apples and sprinkle evenly with brown sugar. Mix gently to ensure everything is well coated.
Sprinkle half of the toasted nuts on top of the mixture, followed by additional sprinkles of cinnamon if desired for extra flavor.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Garnish with the remaining chopped nuts before serving.
